bird.name: Black-hooded antwren
bird.summary: The black-hooded antwren (Formicivora erythronotos) is an Endangered Species of bird in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae,…

locations.name: 里約熱內盧州
locations.summary: 里約熱內盧州（葡萄牙語：Rio de Janeiro，ˈhiw dʒi ʒʌˈnejɾu） 是巴西的一個州。 里約熱內盧州面積43,696.1km²。該州首府是1763年由葡萄牙人建立的里約熱內盧，該市也是州內最大的城市。

locations.name: 次生林
locations.summary: 次生林，又名天然次生林、再生林、再生森林、二次林。是指原始穩定的森林植被遭到人類活動干擾（刀耕火種、林木砍伐）或同等破壞性的自然現象之後，主要透過自然過程再生形成的森林或林地區域。其特徵有別於未曾遭受近期干擾的原始森林、複雜的早期遷移階段…

relations.subject: Black-hooded antwren
relations.evidence: It is now found in several subpopulations along the coast of Baía da Ilha Grande in Rio de Janeiro state

relations.subject: Black-hooded antwren
relations.evidence: There it typically inhabits areas in the early stages of succession such as young second growth and secondary forest
